main_strength: The report correctly identifies key data trends and uses derived signals appropriately.
main_weakness: The interpretation of the data lacks sufficient depth and doesn’t fully leverage the provided evidence packet’s calculations and context. The risk section is superficial.
revision_advice: Expand the macro reasoning to more explicitly connect the data to Mishkin-style concepts and provide a more nuanced assessment of the policy stance. Strengthen the risk section with more detailed analysis of the VIX and yield curve dynamics.
